name: canonical
title: MobilityData Canonical (default)
description: Aligns severities with the MobilityData Canonical Validator. The declared default_severity values in rules.json and every emission site in the validator are now strictly aligned with MobilityData; this profile applies no overrides. The profile is kept as the named identity HTTP gates pass to validateGTFSFiles so the contract `validate(profile="canonical")` remains valid and discoverable, and so future MD divergences can be re-applied here without changing call sites.
